# CODE OF CONDUCT

SYSTEMAI.EXE is committed to a professional, respectful, and security-conscious open-source environment.

---

# Standards

Contributors must:

- Respect others
- Avoid abusive behavior
- Follow responsible disclosure
- Maintain professional communication
- Respect user privacy and security

---

# Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Hate speech
- Malware contributions
- Credential theft
- Destructive code
- Abuse of AI systems

---

# Enforcement

Project maintainers reserve the right to remove harmful contributions or restrict repository access.

---
